hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Sprint 13 delivered Kueue integration (smoke tests + documentation) with no new Go packages. The 3-phase process handled a docs+tests sprint as effectively as feature sprints. All gates passed first run.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: All 4 core gates plus helm lint and smoke vet passed on first run. The smoke vet gate verified that Kueue smoke test files compile correctly with the build tag. Coverage gate confirmed no regression from baseline (~92%).

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 H7 instructions from baseline passed: (1) Kueue smoke tests are independent with per-test namespace and resource setup via t.Cleanup; (2) Integration uses standard k8s APIs (Jobs, Pods, ResourceFlavors) with no novel patterns; (3) No RBAC in smoke tests — tests use the existing Kind cluster admin context; (4) TestKueueAdmitNexaRejects covers failure path, TestKueueSuspendsQuotaExceeded covers Kueue-gated path; (5) Integration guide follows same structure as existing docs (headings, YAML examples, troubleshooting).

hypotheses.name: Flowstate works for greenfield projects
hypotheses.evidence: Sprint 13 is the 14th sprint (0-13). Project now has 82 unit tests + 16 smoke tests, 3 binaries, 3 Helm subcharts, and documented Kueue co-deployment. Process scales to integration/docs sprints as well as feature sprints.
